prompt: A candid street-fashion portrait of two cute anime-inspired girls standing close together in front of a colorful urban graffiti wall on a city sidewalk in Japan, photographed at eye level with a shallow depth of field and soft overcast daylight. Both have smooth pale skin and short blunt bob haircuts with straight ends, their bangs covering part of the forehead, and their faces intentionally simplified or blurred for an anonymous doll-like look. The girl on the left has silver gray hair, wears a black knit beanie with a rectangular patch logo reading "Nightfall", a black leather jacket over a white graphic T-shirt with a dark distressed illustration and purple accent graphic, layered silver chain necklaces including a heart pendant, a black choker, and a black backpack strap over one shoulder. The girl on the right has icy light blue hair, wears a black knit beanie with a white scribble-style logo, an oversized black hoodie with bold hot-pink Japanese graffiti lettering across the chest, a silver chain necklace, and black backpack straps on both shoulders. They lean in slightly toward each other in a relaxed, stylish pose, with one hand lightly touching the hoodie shoulder area. The background is a vivid mural wall in pink, blue, and purple tones, plus a sticker-covered utility pole on the right edge with visible layered street stickers including "SMILE", "AQUARIUS", and a red "HELLO my name is" sticker covered in tags. Emphasize Japanese street style, alternative fashion, kawaii cool mood, realistic fabric textures, crisp clothing detail, subtle cinematic color grading, and a trendy Harajuku snapshot aesthetic.
